## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this needed?

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] chore
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test

## Validation

- [ ] I ran `npm run lint`
- [ ] I ran `npm test`
- [ ] I tested the changed flow manually

## Risk and Rollback

- Risk level: low / medium / high
- Rollback plan:

## Checklist

- [ ] PR targets `main`
- [ ] No secrets or credentials added
- [ ] I did not force-push to `main`
